notes:
## What's Changed

- fix: security hotfix v0.14.4 - resolve 42 dependency vulnerabilities (#110) (294adc4)
- Release v0.14.4 (#109) (f217e63)
- fix: remove unused glib dependency to fix cross-compilation (#103) (62de323)
- feat: Modular BuildProject architecture with XState v5 and native macOS file transfers (#102) (fe19bb9)
- Release v0.14.2 (#99) (df7c831)
- fix: split build and notarization into separate workflow jobs (#97) (105e27b)
- fix: increase publish workflow timeout to 120 minutes (1df910f)
- chore: bump version to 0.14.2 (3d063f6)
- fix: build native binaries for both Apple Silicon and Intel Macs (8fad647)
- fix: build only arm64 binaries and increase notarization timeout (6db96a6)
- Release v0.14.1 (#96) (bbea677)
- fix: skip notarization in CI builds (0667df7)
- fix: build for aarch64-apple-darwin only in CI (2553489)
- chore: bump version to 0.14.1 (1fe549b)
- chore: bump version to 0.14.0 (dff678d)
- fix: use correct playwright config in auto-release-pr workflow (7250e52)
- chore: bump version to 0.13.0 (2a0a8a1)
- fix: update system theme to use dark styling and adjust isDark flag (#94) (0857393)
- fix: stabilize theme preview hover behavior (#93) (7c3eb53)
- feat: improve Settings page styling and navigation (#92) (3f2cf25)
- chore: remove obsolete docs, planning artifacts, and local Claude config (#91) (428d300)
- fix(e2e): improve BuildProject E2E test stability and coverage (#90) (25bf41d)
- refactor: update UploadSprout to use standard page template (#89) (6999409)
- feat: refactor Settings page to use ErrorBoundary wrapper pattern (#87) (8b8f398)
- refactor: update UploadTrello page to use consistent UI template (#88) (016d350)
- feat: add 4 new light themes for better variety (#86) (aff9823)
- release conflict merge (#84) (6c4e6f3)
- Update/increment minor (#82) (32f14f8)
- feat: add scrollable UpdateDialog for long release notes (#77) (a603024)
- ui: updated settings menu and added accordion to themes card (#81) (c23dab1)
- updated example embeddings page with new ui (#80) (45f4d9a)
- feat: Update ScriptFormatter UI with Baker template pattern and theme support (#78) (e090107)
- ui/menu remove lightmode toggle (#79) (2486396)
- added links to menu icons on dashboard when closed (#74) (1cf1df5)
- fix: remove unused variable and apply prettier formatting in nav-main tests (f832040)
- test: add comprehensive test suite for NavMain component (84bc00f)
- added links to menu icons on dashboard when closed (5ae2a76)
- prettier fix (d6cfa6d)
- feat: add 'tokyo-night' theme with corresponding styles and update related components (9c1165e)
- feat: update ThemeColorSwatch and ThemeSelector components for improved layout and accessibility (f81bfd9)
- feat: add theme customization support with multiple themes and dynamic loading (04a8a58)
- feat: Replace Framer Motion animations with CSS transforms for improved performance and accessibility (2a92dda)
- feat: Optimize API calls and improve search functionality (57a5a27)
- feat: complete Phase 4 optimizations including debouncing, font loading, and deep equality checks (089b923)
- feat: implement virtual scrolling for ProjectFileList and ProjectListPanel components to enhance performance with large lists (99a76e9)
- fix(tests): update test results to reflect successful runs and enhance error handling (f977ad1)
- feat: add PreviewProgress component and integrate with breadcrumbs preview functionality (19431a9)
- feat: implement memoization for ProjectListPanel, ProjectList, VideoLinkCard, and ProjectFileList components to enhance performance (0d9a9a6)
- feat: implement performance optimizations for ProjectListPanel with React.memo and add corresponding tests (f2d73ab)
- PR #69 introduced new hooks (useWindowState.ts and useSystemTheme.ts) that call Tauri window APIs (getCurrentWindow() from @tauri-apps/api/window). These APIs weren't mocked in the test environment, causing the test to fail with: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'metadata') Changes Made tests/setup/vitest-setup.ts - Added comprehensive mock for @tauri-apps/api/window: Mocked getCurrentWindow() to return a window object with all necessary methods Included mocks for: setPosition, setSize, outerPosition, outerSize, onResized, onMoved, theme, onThemeChanged Placed the mock at module level (before mockTauriApis()) to ensure proper hoisting by vitest src/app/dashboard/tests/example.test.tsx - Fixed mock ordering: Moved vi.mock('next-themes') before the import App statement to ensure proper mock hoisting (617ad26)
- feat: enhance Posterframe component with error handling, improved layout, and user feedback (49eaf48)
- refactor: simplify macOS detection and improve error handling in hooks (d06c013)
- chore: bump version to 0.10.0 (6f2ab45)
- feat: Add version bump scripts and branching strategy documentation (198f6ec)
- style: Update TitleBar component for improved layout and styling (6392b1a)
- feat: enhance macOS support with custom title bar and window state persistence (43d69bb)

Download the appropriate installer for your platform from the assets below.
